title: scrophularia marginata
intro: Scrophularia marginata, also known as the sea fig or sea rosemary, is a flowering plant that belongs to the figwort family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The health benefits of Scrophularia marginata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies. Scrophularia marginata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
